mmap.h(3) Library Functions Manual mmap.h(3)

NAME

mmap.h - Cross-platform memory-mapped file interface.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct platform_mmap
Memory-mapped file handle.

Typedefs


typedef struct platform_mmap platform_mmap_t
Memory-mapped file handle.

Functions


void platform_mmap_init (platform_mmap_t *mapping)
Initialize a platform_mmap_t structure. asciichat_error_t platform_mmap_open (const char *name, const char *path, size_t size, platform_mmap_t *out)
Memory-map a file for read/write access. void platform_mmap_close (platform_mmap_t *mapping)
Unmap and close a memory-mapped file. void platform_mmap_sync (platform_mmap_t *mapping, bool async)
Flush memory-mapped changes to disk. bool platform_mmap_is_valid (const platform_mmap_t *mapping)
Check if a mapping is currently valid.

Detailed Description

Cross-platform memory-mapped file interface.

Definition in file platform/mmap.h.
